applicant_info.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management - warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio.

CG 20 26 04 13 - Additional Insured - Designated Person or Organization
additional_fields.additional_insured: Navigator Realty Management Inc. is an Additional Insured under the General Liability and Umbrella policies as required by the underlying contract.
special_conditions: Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement.
Waiver of Subrogation applies in favor of the certificate holder as required by written contract.
Per Project Aggregate Limit applies as indicated on the endorsement schedule.
additional_fields.subcontractor_requirements: All subcontractors must maintain Commercial General Liability with limits not less than $1,000,000 per occurrence and $2,000,000 general aggregate.

remarks: Endorsement schedule, additional insured details, special conditions, location descriptions, subcontractor requirements, and nature of operations as listed in additional remarks.
